description: FM-15/24 intersection (RPN=16/48): Reasoning agent emits one execute_code call (x = 42), then its final response has finishReason=SAFETY with empty text. The orchestrator detects the missing final answer and yields an [RLM ERROR] event. Covers the case where the reasoning-level model is blocked by safety filters on the final turn.

responses.note: Reasoning agent calls execute_code to compute x = 42
Reasoning agent returns EMPTY text with finishReason=SAFETY. Model stopped by safety filter. ADK stores '' in output_key 'reasoning_output'. Orchestrator detects empty final_answer and yields error.

expected.final_answer: [RLM ERROR] Reasoning agent completed without producing a structured final answer. Check output_schema wiring.
